zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Penyson於1440年出生在義大利皮蒙特時，她的父親Gregorio Panizzone36歲，母親Giuliana26歲。她於1456年12月22日與Sir William Vaux在義大利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1509年6月28日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈洛登享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭希迪 本 倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Penyson于1440年出生在意大利皮蒙特时，她的父亲Gregorio Panizzone36岁，母亲Giuliana26岁。她于1456年12月22日与Sir William Vaux在意大利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1509年6月28日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈洛登享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰希迪 本 倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Penyson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: patronymic from the Middle English female personal name Penn, a pet form of Pernel, or perhaps from the Middle English personal name Payne + -son. See Penn , Parnell .

habitational name from Penson in North Huish (Devon), which derives from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Payn(e) (see Payne ) + Middle English toun ‘village, town, settlement’ (Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’).

variants.name: Payne
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Pai(e)n, Pagen (from Latin Paganus), a fairly common personal name among Normans. It derived from a word that originally meant ‘villager, rustic’, later ‘heathen’, but it had doubtless lost these connotations in its use as a late medieval personal name. This name has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

History: Thomas Payne, who was a freeman of Plymouth Colony in 1639, was the founder of a large American family, which included Robert Treat Paine (1731–1814), one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. See also   Paine  .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Penyson was born in 1440, in Piedmont, Italy, her father, Gregorio Panizzone, was 36 and her mother, Giuliana, was 26. She married Sir William Vaux on 22 December 1456, in Italy. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 28 June 1509, in Harrowden, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in City of London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Penyson est née en 1440, à Piemonte, Italie, son père, Gregorio Panizzone, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Giuliana, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Vaux le 22 décembre 1456, à Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 28 juin 1509, à Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à City of London, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Penyson 1440 in Piemonte, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gregorio Panizzone 36 und ihre Mutter Giuliana 26. Sie hat am 22. Dezember 1456 in Italien Sir William Vaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 28. Juni 1509 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Harrowden, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in City of London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Penyson è nata il nel 1440 nel Piemonte, Italia, sua padre, Gregorio Panizzone, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Giuliana, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Vaux il 22 dicembre 1456, nel Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 giugno 1509, nel Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a City of London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Penysonが1440年にイタリアピエモントで生まれた時，父Gregorio Panizzoneは36歳，母Giulianaは26歳であった。1456年12月22日にイタリアでSir William Vauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1509年6月28日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーロウデンで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシトイ オフ ロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Penyson(이)가 1440년 이탈리아 피몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gregorio Panizzone(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Giuliana(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1456년 12월 22일 이탈리아에서 Sir William Vaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1509년 6월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 해로우든에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 시티 프 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Penyson nasceu em 1440, em Piemonte, Itália, seu pai, Gregorio Panizzone, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Giuliana, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Vaux em 22 de dezembro de 1456, em Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 28 de junho de 1509, em Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em City of London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Penyson родилась в 1440 г. в местности пиемонт, Италия, её отцу по имени Gregorio Panizzone было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Giuliana, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Vaux 22 декабря 1456 г. в местности Италия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 28 июня 1509 г. в местности харроуден, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности сити оф лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir William Vaux el 22 de diciembre de 1456, en Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
